name: Monarch Tractor
relevance: MK-V driver-optional autonomous electric tractor plus WingspanAI; vineyard/orchard sim plus synthetic row-crop data feed the autonomy and analytics stack.
note: electric autonomous tractor and farm management platform
subject: Simulation and synthetic data for Monarch Tractor
email_body: Hi Praveen, I am writing from DoDAO. I came across Monarch Tractor and the MK-V driver-optional autonomous electric tractor plus the WingspanAI platform. We help robotics teams with two things that precede training and testing on hardware: - A clean simulation world for your robot — robot model, workspace, sensors, parts, lighting, and physics, built in Gazebo or Isaac Sim. - Labelled synthetic data for your models — images, masks, depth, pose, demonstration trajectories, and edge cases, shipped in the format your team already uses. For your stack that would likely mean a vineyard and orchard sim and synthetic row-crop data for the autonomy and analytics stack. You can see an overview of our services here. Thanks, Ryan Smith DoDAO
